mapper.select:
SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts
AND category = #{category}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY view_count DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY like_count DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts ORDER BY view_count DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT tag_name FROM post_tags WHERE tag_name IS NOT NULL AND tag_name != '' ORDER BY tag_name ASC
SELECT id, author, title, content, category, created_at AS createdAt, edited_at AS editedAt, view_count AS viewCount, like_count AS likeCount FROM posts WHERE id = #{postId}
SELECT id, post_id AS postId, parent_id AS parentId, author, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
